PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE FURTHER RESPONSES TO MOVING PARTY'S FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET TWO) WITHIN 14 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF ORDER. SANCTIONS FOR ABUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HER COUNSEL IN THE AMOUNT OF $2400 PAYABLE WITHIN TEN DAYS OF THE DATE OF ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN WORD FORMAT TO THE TEMPORARY JUDGE AT JAMESHFLEMING@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff Gloria Chavez Re: Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Special Interrogatories(Set Two); And Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT STONESTOWN FAMILY YMCA'S Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff Gloria Chavez Re: Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Special Interrogatories(Set Two); And Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Counsel

The motion is unopposed and is granted. Plaintiff shall serve further responses to moving party's Form Interrogatories (Set One) and Special Interrogatories (Set Two) within 14 days from the date of order. Sanctions for abuse of the discovery process are awarded against plaintiff and her counsel in the amount of $2400 payable within ten days of the date of order. Prevailing party shall submit a proposed order in Word format to the Temporary Judge at jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
